label: Ecowitt GW3000 -> InfluxDB
info:
Flow: sub MQTT `ecowitt/gw3000`, parse JSON Ecowitt multi-sensore, split su canali 1..4, write bucket `garden` measurement `soil_moisture` con tag aiuola=test, position=test.

In step 4 il parse popola anche global.soil_moisture_cache letto dalla decision loop.

name: parse WH51 -> points + cache

label: Valvola SWV (cmd + stato + safety)
info:
Flow valvola SONOFF SWV (Zigbee via Z2M).

Endpoint HTTP:
- POST /api/valve/{on,off,toggle}
In step 4: source 'manual' marcata in global.last_cmd_source.

Stato:
- sub zigbee2mqtt/SWV_valvola -> write valve_state + aggiorna global.valve_state_runtime + irrigation_events.

Safety timer legge irrigation.safety_timeout_seconds dal config store (default 900s).

name: CORS preflight 204
validate + build MQTT cmd
update global.valve_state_runtime
parse state -> influx point
safety timer auto-OFF (config-driven)
traccia irrigation_events (esteso)
build valve state response

label: Config Store (step 4)
info:
Config store per irrigation. Persistenza /data/irrigation_config.json, source of truth global.irrigation_config.

Endpoint:
- GET /api/config -> JSON intero
- POST /api/config/<dot.path> body {value:...} -> applica + persisti
- GET /api/state -> snapshot runtime
- MQTT in orto/config/set/<sec>/<key> payload=raw -> applica
- MQTT out orto/config/result {ok,key,value|error}

Validazione backend authoritative (vedi nc-fn-validate).

name: parse + set global
respond config JSON
validate + apply (HTTP)
validate + apply (MQTT)
respond runtime state

label: Weather (Open-Meteo)
info:
Polling Open-Meteo ogni weather.polling_interval_seconds (default 1800).
Cache in global.weather_cache + write su weather_forecast.
Fallback: API down -> cache non svuotata, decisione marcata weather_available=false dopo cache_max_age.

name: scheduler
parse + cache + influx point

label: Boot Recovery (step 4)
info:
Eseguito una volta all'avvio Node-RED dopo subscribe MQTT e load config.
Legge global.valve_state_runtime e ultimi eventi InfluxDB, applica una delle 5 azioni di recovery (vedi step4 §9).

name: resolve recovery scenario

label: Decision Loop (step 4)
info:
Tick ogni 60s. Dispatcher:
- in_progress=true -> monitoring (chiusura per soglia o timeout)
- in_progress=false E now-last_decision >= polling_interval -> decision

Algoritmo: vedi step4 §7. Logga ogni decisione (anche skip) su irrigation_events.

name: decision/monitoring dispatcher
decision logic
monitoring logic

label: API readers (step 5: FE PWA)
info:
Endpoint GET di sola lettura per il frontend PWA (step 5).

- GET /api/sensors/last       -> last per WH51_01..06 (soil_moisture)
- GET /api/sensors/trend      -> trend con range temporale + aggregation auto
- GET /api/valve/intervals    -> intervalli apertura distinti auto/manual
- GET /api/valve/cumulative   -> somma duration_seconds nel range
- GET /api/weather/now        -> last weather_forecast (cache InfluxDB)
- GET /api/weather/forecast   -> 7 giorni daily da Open-Meteo (live).

name: build flux
format response
build flux
format response
build flux
format response
build flux
format response
build flux
format response
build Open-Meteo URL
format response

label: System (step 5: health + shutdown)
info:
Endpoint di sistema per il FE PWA.

- GET  /api/system/health   uptime + stato componenti (no auth)
- POST /api/system/shutdown body { confirm: 'shutdown' } -> sudo /sbin/shutdown -h +1

Richiede sudoers: /etc/sudoers.d/nodered-shutdown
  nodered ALL=(root) NOPASSWD: /sbin/shutdown -h +1, /sbin/shutdown -c
Se il container nodered gira come UID 1000, la regola vale per l'utente 'as' sull'host.

name: build health response
validate + prep flag
build ack response
